entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A staple food crop targeted for biofortification to improve nutritional content

entities.name: IRON CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of iron (Fe) in the grains of pearl millet

entities.name: ZINC CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of zinc (Zn) in the grains of pearl millet

entities.name: CALCIUM CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of calcium (Ca) in the grains of pearl millet

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of phosphorus (P) in the grains of pearl millet

entities.name: MOLYBDENUM CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of molybdenum (Mo) in the grains of pearl millet

entities.name: MAGNESIUM CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of magnesium (Mg) in the grains of pearl millet

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: An agronomic trait measuring the time to reach 50% flowering

entities.name: 1000-GRAIN WEIGHT
entities.description: An agronomic trait measuring the weight of 1000 grains

entities.name: GRAIN NUTRIENTS
entities.description: General term for the essential micronutrients found in the grain

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach to increase the nutritional value of food crops

entities.name: FIELD TRIALS
entities.description: The process of evaluating germplasm accessions under field conditions

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The diversity of genetic characteristics within a population or gene pool

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENT MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A health condition caused by a deficiency of essential micronutrients

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of observed variation in a trait that is due to genetic variation

entities.name: GENOTYPE BY ENVIRONMENT INTERACTION
entities.description: The way in which different genotypes respond to different environments

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of a larger germplasm collection used for efficiency

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the field trials were conducted
